core_mechanism: a measure-preserving bijection between two equal-cardinality product spaces that factorizes a uniform joint distribution into independent uniform marginals, letting the entropy of an auxiliary coordinate be exactly recovered and recycled into a residual random state
brief_reason: The abstract's central claim is that the round-local map (S,T) <-> (S',D) is a bijection between two product sets of equal size, so S' and D emerge independent and uniform and the digit D can be merged losslessly into a residual uniform state.
